display.purpose: Hero counters and metrics. Data gets hero presence.

headline.purpose: Section headings, customer names, device models.

title.purpose: The Big Value in Small Label / Big Value spec-sheet pairings.

body.purpose: Descriptions, notes, general content. Max 65 to 75ch line length.

label.purpose: The Small Label in spec-sheet pairings. Uppercase for metadata.

shadows.name: ambient-float
shadows.purpose: Drag-and-drop elements or temporarily elevated containers. Tinted with primary blue, never pure gray or black.

shadows.name: subtle-lift
shadows.purpose: Active navigation items, top bar. Barely perceptible structural lift.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Global focus-visible ring for all interactive elements. 2px offset.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. 150ms duration.

motion.name: fade-slide-up
motion.purpose: Entrance animation for modals and cards. Translates Y 1rem to 0 with opacity 0 to 1.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Tablets in landscape. Top bar padding and main content shift.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar becomes visible. Main content offset by 256px.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop with full layout breathing room.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Reliable Blue fill, white text, shadow for depth.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background-color: #0040a1; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #0056d2; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: Primary Gradient Button
components.description: Signature CTA for Intake and Delivery flows. 135deg gradient from Reliable Blue to Reliable Blue Light.
components.css: .ds-btn-gradient { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0040a1 0%, #0056d2 100%); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-gradient:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-gradient:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-gradient:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action button. Highest Surface fill with muted text, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background-color: #dfe3e8; color: #2d4867; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #ebeef4; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis text-only action. Transparent fill, Muted Ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background-color: transparent; color: #424654; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f1f4fa; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Stateful input field. Highest Surface at rest, white on focus with primary ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 1rem; border: none; background-color: #dfe3e8; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; color: #181c20; outline: none; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { background-color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0040a1; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; inset-inline-start: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #737785; font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-input-wrapper:focus-within .ds-input-icon { color: #0040a1; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Muted at rest, primary on hover, white card on active.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 12px; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); color: #424654; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background-color: #ebeef4; color: #0040a1; } .ds-nav-item-active { background-color: #ffffff; color: #0040a1; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-icon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size: 20px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; } .ds-nav-label { font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact status indicator. Full-rounded to contrast against xl-rounded cards.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1rem; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; } .ds-chip-in-repair { background-color: rgba(0,64,161,0.1); color: #0040a1; } .ds-chip-intake { background-color: #bed9ff; color: #445f7f; } .ds-chip-waiting { background-color: #ffdbcf; color: #812800; } .ds-chip-done { background-color: #dae2ff; color: #0040a1; } .ds-chip-delivered { background-color: #ebeef4; color: #424654; } .ds-chip-returned { background-color: #ffdad6; color: #93000a; } .ds-chip-cancelled { background-color: #e5e8ee; color: #424654; text-decoration: line-through; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: The Small Label / Big Value spec-sheet pattern. Data is the hero.
components.html:
ACTIVE JOBS
12repairs
3 overdue
components.css: .ds-metric-card { border-radius: 1rem; background-color: #f1f4fa; padding: 20px; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-metric-label { font-weight: 500; color: #424654; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; } .ds-metric-value-row { margin-top: 4px; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; } .ds-metric-value { font-weight: 800; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 2.25rem; line-height: 2.5rem; color: #181c20; } .ds-metric-unit { font-weight: 500; color: #424654; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; } .ds-metric-detail { margin-top: 4px; color: #424654; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1rem; font-family: 'Karla', sans-serif; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Horizontal fill bar for completion percentage. 4px height, full-rounded.
components.css: .ds-progress { height: 4px; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #dfe3e8; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 9999px; transition: all 500ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-progress-primary { background-color: #0040a1; } .ds-progress-secondary { background-color: #445f7f; } .ds-progress-tertiary { background-color: #822800; } .ds-progress-error { background-color: #ba1a1a; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: 24px track toggle. Off: Highest Surface with Muted Ink thumb. On: Primary with white thumb.
components.css: .ds-switch { position: relative; height: 24px; width: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color, background-color, border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); background-color: #dfe3e8; } .ds-switch-on { background-color: #0040a1; } .ds-switch-thumb { position: absolute; top: 2px; height: 20px; width: 20px; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); inset-inline-start: 2px; background-color: #424654; } .ds-switch-on .ds-switch-thumb { inset-inline-start: 22px; background-color: #ffffff; } .ds-switch:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0040a1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-switch:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

narrative.overview:
In a fast-paced repair environment, a UI should not just be a tool; it should be a precision instrument. This system moves away from the "generic SaaS" look of boxes-inside-boxes. Instead, it embraces a high-end editorial approach that mirrors the technical sophistication of a master mechanic. This is achieved through Tonal Layering, using varying depths of light and color rather than harsh lines to organize information. The layout prioritizes glanceability for a shop floor while maintaining a sophisticated, premium aesthetic that builds immediate trust with high-value clients.

The system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboard conventions: no cookie-cutter sidebar + cards + charts templates, no CRUD-admin-panel layouts. Structure comes from surface depth, not lines.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering over lines: surface hierarchy through color depth, never 1px borders
Glanceability: big numbers, clear status indicators, generous spacing
Tablet-native touch: 44px minimum targets, no hover-dependent interactions
Editorial data: Small Label / Big Value spec-sheet pairing
Integrated visual language: statuses, alerts, errors share one tonal system

rules.name: The No-Line Rule
rules.body: 1px solid borders are prohibited for sectioning. Structural boundaries must be created through background color shifts.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals are tinted toward the blue hue (chroma 0.005 to 0.01). Neutrals should feel like they belong to the same palette as Reliable Blue, not like they were pulled from a generic gray scale.

rules.name: The Spec-Sheet Rule
rules.body: Always pair a label (Small) above or beside a title (Big Value). Label-sm in Muted Ink paired with Title-md in Ink mimics technical spec sheets and enables glanceability.

rules.name: The Ghost Border Fallback
rules.body: If high-contrast accessibility requires a structural edge, use Ghost Border (#c3c6d6) at 15% opacity. It should be felt, not seen. Never use 100% opaque outline colors for borders.

dos: Do use display-scale Manrope for Days in Shop counters. Make the data the hero.
Do use asymmetrical layouts. Wide column for repair details, narrow surface-container-high column for parts list.
Do leave breathing room. High-speed environments require more white space, not less.
Do use the Small Label / Big Value pairing for every data point that matters.
Do use Integrated Visual Language: error containers, not alert reds; surface depth, not box shadows.
donts: Don't use 100% opaque outline colors for borders. It breaks the Engineering Atelier sophistication.
Don't use standard Alert Red for everything. Use error-container (#ffdad6) with on-error-container text.
Don't use icons without labels in the main navigation. Speed requires clarity.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard templates with cookie-cutter sidebar + cards + charts.
Don't use CRUD admin panel layouts. Structure comes from surface depth, not lines.
Don't use divider lines between list items. 16px vertical spacing and background shifts.
Don't use 1px solid borders for sectioning. Background color shifts create structure.
